verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Break my heart, dear Lord Tear the barriers down. Show me with convicting tears The glory of Your crown.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My heart is hard My soul so weak The ways of evil Cut so deep I need you Lord To come inside And gently break My heart

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I once was blind, but now I see The glory set for me Show me Father where to start And gently break my heart
